description: Build, inspect, and flash WCH CH32V/CH32X RISC-V microcontroller projects created by MounRiver Studio. Use when Codex needs to run MounRiver headless builds, diagnose generated Makefiles, or flash through WCH-Link/OpenOCD.
adapter_notes: Use MounRiver eclipsec CDT headless build for build/clean. Use MounRiver OpenOCD with wch-riscv.cfg for WCH-Link flashing. Support --dry-run when hardware is missing.
